rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"decision","text":"Kody 0.3.2 verify-gate allows PRs to progress despite pre-existing TS/ESLint errors in unrelated files—this is intentional design.","scope":"kody"},{"kind":"convention","text":"'live-test' task type validates Kody engine improvements by running actual pipeline tasks with specific constraints.","scope":"kody"}]}
